title: BHN Node Bandwidth (vnstat)
description: Per-node bandwidth totals from vnstat — hourly, daily, monthly per interface. Populated by bhn-vnstat-collector.sh on each node.

panels.title: Hourly egress (tx) per node — sum over all interfaces

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, node_name AS metric, SUM(tx_bytes) AS tx FROM node_bandwidth_stats WHERE period_type='hour' AND $__timeFilter(period_start) GROUP BY 1, node_name ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Current month totals per node × interface

targets.rawSql: SELECT node_name, interface, rx_bytes, tx_bytes, (rx_bytes + tx_bytes) AS total_bytes FROM node_bandwidth_stats WHERE period_type='month' AND period_start = date_trunc('month', NOW()) ORDER BY total_bytes DESC
